Title: Home loads and cart button navigates to cart
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce; 2. Verify Products heading is visible; 3. Locate cart button in header; 4. Click cart button
Expected_Result: Home page loads with Products heading visible and cart button navigates to /ecommerce/cart

Title: @smoke Home page loads with product listing after login
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce; 2. Verify Products heading; 3. Verify price indicators visible
Expected_Result: Home page displays Products heading and product items with price indicators

Title: Home loads and cart button navigates to cart
Steps: 1. Verify page loads; 2. Locate and click cart icon button
Expected_Result: Cart icon is visible and clickable; user navigates to /ecommerce/cart

Title: Profile dropdown shows menu options
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Locate profile button with aria-haspopup='menu'; 2. Click profile button; 3. Verify Favourites menu item visible; 4. Verify Logout menu item visible
Expected_Result: Profile dropdown opens and displays Favourites and Logout menu items

Title: Logout clears session and protects home route
Steps: 1. Click profile button; 2. Click Logout menu item; 3. Observe URL and navigation; 4. Try to access /ecommerce directly
Expected_Result: Session is cleared user is redirected to login page unauthorized access to home is blocked

Title: Sorting dropdown contains expected options
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown (role='combobox'); 2. Verify 'A to Z' option visible; 3. Verify 'Z to A' option visible; 4. Verify 'Low to High' option visible; 5. Verify 'High to Low' option visible
Expected_Result: Sorting dropdown displays all four sort options correctly

Title: A to Z sort orders product names ascending
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown; 2. Select 'A to Z' option; 3. Capture product names; 4. Verify alphabetical order
Expected_Result: Products are sorted alphabetically in ascending order (A to Z)

Title: Z to A sort orders product names descending
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown; 2. Select 'Z to A' option; 3. Capture product names; 4. Verify reverse alphabetical order
Expected_Result: Products are sorted alphabetically in descending order (Z to A)

Title: Price sort low to high behaves correctly
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown; 2. Select 'Low to High' option; 3. Capture prices from product cards; 4. Verify prices are in ascending order
Expected_Result: Products are sorted by price in ascending order (lowest to highest)

Title: Search option is discoverable and usable when available
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown; 2. Look for Search option; 3. If present: select and enter keyword 'bag'; 4. Observe filtered results; 5. Enter unmatched keyword 'xxxxx'
Expected_Result: Search filters products dynamically; no results message appears for unmatched keywords

Title: Add to cart updates badge
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Verify cart badge is empty or count is 0; 2. Click 'Add to Cart' button on first product; 3. Observe cart badge update
Expected_Result: Cart badge becomes visible with item count after clicking Add to Cart

Title: @smoke Add to cart increments the cart badge
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Click Add to Cart on first product; 2. Verify cart badge appears
Expected_Result: Cart badge becomes visible and shows item count after adding item

Title: Favourite toggle control is clickable on product cards
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Locate favourite button on product card; 2. Click favourite button; 3. Click again to toggle back
Expected_Result: Favourite button is clickable and toggles state on each click

Title: Footer links are visible and at least one is navigable
Preconditions: User is logged in on home page
Steps: 1. Scroll to page footer; 2. Verify footer is visible; 3. Verify footer contains Quick Links Follow Us Support text; 4. Click first footer link
Expected_Result: Footer is visible contains expected sections and links navigate correctly

Title: Product API failure keeps UI in guarded state
Steps: 1. Mock product API to fail; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce; 3. Observe page state
Expected_Result: Page displays guarded state with error message or fallback content; UI remains stable

Title: @regression High-to-low sort mode is applied correctly
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown; 2. Select 'High to Low' option; 3. Capture prices; 4. Verify descending order
Expected_Result: Products are sorted by price in descending order (highest to lowest)

Title: @regression Multiple add-to-cart updates badge count
Steps: 1. Click Add to Cart on first product; 2. Observe badge; 3. Click Add to Cart on second product; 4. Verify badge increments
Expected_Result: Cart badge increments correctly with each Add to Cart action

Title: @regression Unauthenticated access redirects to login
Steps: 1. Clear cookies and storage; 2. Navigate directly to /ecommerce
Expected_Result: Unauthenticated user is redirected to login page or unauthenticated state is enforced
